objectives.text: 掌握常接动名词的动词
了解动名词作主语和宾语的用法

blocks.content: **动名词**是由动词加 -ing 构成的一种非谓语动词形式，与现在分词同形，但用法不同。
动名词在句中起**名词**的作用，可以作主语、宾语、表语等。

blocks.title: 动名词 vs 现在分词
blocks.content: 动名词相当于名词，表示「做某事这件事」；现在分词相当于形容词或副词，表示「正在做某事」或「令人……的」。
许多动词后面只能接动名词作宾语，不能接不定式：

rows: Do you mind opening the window?
Keep trying and you will succeed.
He practices speaking English every day.
I considered moving to another city.
He suggested going to the park.
You should avoid making the same mistake.

blocks.title: 记忆口诀
blocks.content: 「享（enjoy）完（finish）介（mind）持（keep）练（practice）考（consider）建（suggest）避（avoid）」—— 这些词后面都要接 doing。
动名词可以直接放在句首作主语：
**Swimming** is good exercise.（游泳是很好的运动。）
**Reading** books can help you learn new words.（读书可以帮助你学习新单词。）
常用形式：It is + adj. + doing sth.（做某事是……的）
It is **useful** learning English.（学英语是有用的。）

blocks.title: 注意
blocks.content: 动名词作主语时，谓语动词用单数形式。
以下介词短语后面必须接动名词：

rows: I am interested in learning Chinese.
We look forward to seeing you.
He is used to getting up early.
Pay attention to spelling this word correctly.
I stayed home instead of going out.

blocks.title: 易错提醒
blocks.content: look forward to、be used to、pay attention to 中的 to 是介词，不是不定式的 to，后面必须接 doing。

problem.content: She enjoys ___ music in her free time.

solution.content: enjoy 后面只能接动名词作宾语，正确形式为 enjoy listening to。答案选 C。

problem.content: He is looking forward to ___ from you.

solution.content: look forward to 中的 to 是介词，后面必须接动名词 hearing。答案选 C。

children.text: 动词 + ing（与现在分词同形）
be good at / be interested in + doing
look forward to / be used to + doing
注意：这里的 to 是介词，不是不定式的 to
